creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
I found a way to reproduce:
tcpdump -n -vvvvv -i lan0 "ip and tcp and tcp[1024] != 0"


[252409] #0 0xffffffff80665e1b at kdb_backtrace+0x6b
